rules.rule_text:
title: Potential Data Exfiltration Using Cyberduck
id: c2cc89c6-1503-481a-b013-306a5f1ce935
status: test
description: Detects the use of Cyberduck to upload data
references:
- https://docs.duck.sh/cli
author: NTT Security - Andreas Foureaux
date: 2025-09-22
logsource:
  category: process_creation
detection:
  selection_command:
    CommandLine|contains|all:
    - duck
    CommandLine|contains:
    - --upload
    - --copy
  condition: selection_command
falsepositives:
- Legitimate use of the tool
level: medium
